message:
style(web/sse): demote orphaned /// doc-comment to // line comment in SseRecvState

The quarantine note at crates/frankenterm-core/src/web/sse.rs:224 inside the
impl SseRecvState block was written as a /// doc comment but is the last item
in the impl — there is no following function, const, or type for the doc
comment to attach to. rustdoc-orphan-doc-comment (an rustc lint in newer
toolchains) warns on this shape because the comment would silently disappear
from generated docs.

Convert the four lines to // line comments. The note still documents the
legacy non-asupersync quarantine, still carries the ft-xbnl0.2.5 owner tag,
and still explains the removal path ("drop this note once the workspace no
longer supports non-asupersync-runtime SSE builds"). No behavioral change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
